overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy, foggy cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, massive futuristic architecture, and wet reflective pavement. The player character walks along the sidewalk observing the atmospheric urban environment with occasional pedestrians and parked vehicles. The footage is clearly from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) with cinematic lighting and heavy atmospheric fog.

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the massive fog-shrouded skyscraper
camera tilts back down to street level to continue walking

agents.ego_description: standing at the street corner looking around, then gazing up at the towering building

entered.detail: industrial metal pipes and walkways spanning across the street
tall pole with traffic signals and street signs

concrete curb with yellow tactile paving at the intersection

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a rainy cyberpunk street corner with industrial overhead pipelines and neon billboards. The camera pans around the intersection before tilting upward to reveal a massive skyscraper disappearing into the fog, then returns to street level. The environment is empty of pedestrians, with wet reflective pavement and atmospheric fog dominating the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit sidewalk with palm trees and industrial overpass

events.description: moving from the open intersection into the continuous sidewalk corridor
approaching a parked vehicle with NPCs standing nearby

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk under the glow of neon lights and street lamps

entered.detail: tall palm tree lining the sidewalk
building wall illuminated with red neon strip lighting
short black posts with yellow stripes lining the sidewalk edge
dark colored sport utility vehicle parked at the curb

segments.scene_description: The camera walks along a rain-soaked sidewalk lined with palm trees and illuminated by red neon building lights. The environment transitions from the open intersection to a more enclosed street corridor with industrial elements overhead. Sparse pedestrians walk in the opposite direction as the camera approaches a parked SUV and bus stop shelter.

scene_state.functional_zone: street section with parked vehicle and pedestrian activity

events.description: passing the parked SUV on the left side of the sidewalk
pedestrian density increases with several people walking on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking past the parked vehicle and navigating through pedestrians on the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: standing near the parked SUV facing the street
walking along the sidewalk in the rain wearing dark clothing

entered.detail: tall digital advertisement screen displaying animated content

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking past a parked SUV where an NPC stands nearby, then moves through a section with moderate pedestrian traffic. The sidewalk remains wet and reflective under the neon lights, with a bus stop shelter and vertical billboards visible on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: open street approaching intersection with distant neon signs

events.description: slight turn to the right as approaching the crosswalk area
approaching the next intersection with visible traffic lights

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk approaching an intersection, observing a pedestrian with an umbrella

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with yellow umbrella crossing the street ahead

entered.detail: elevated roadway or monorail track spanning the street
traffic signals visible at the upcoming intersection
white painted stripes marking the pedestrian crossing

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera approaching the next intersection, passing under an overhead bridge structure. A pedestrian with a yellow umbrella crosses the street in the distance. The environment opens up again with crosswalk lines visible on the wet pavement and distant traffic lights glowing through the fog.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a desolate, towering intersection into a more populated urban corridor that eventually opens back up to the city streets. It begins at a rainy corner beneath industrial pipelines, where the camera pans across wet pavement before tilting up toward a massive skyscraper vanishing into the fog. As the camera moves forward, the open intersection transitions into an enclosed sidewalk lined with palm trees and red neon lights, passing sparse pedestrians and a parked SUV. The scene then shifts through a more crowded section of the walkway, moving past a bus stop shelter and vertical billboards that reflect off the rain-soaked ground. Finally, the camera passes under an overhead bridge and approaches a new intersection, where a pedestrian with a yellow umbrella crosses the street amidst glowing traffic lights and dense atmospheric fog.
